tools.name: validate_email
tools.description: Validate a single email address with comprehensive checks: syntax (RFC 5322), MX records, disposable domain detection, role-based detection, SPF/DKIM, typo suggestions, and risk scoring (0-100).

tools.name: validate_batch
tools.description: Batch validate up to 100 email addresses at once. Returns individual results plus summary stats.

tools.name: check_domain
tools.description: Check domain reputation: MX records, SPF, DKIM, disposable detection, A record existence, and overall reputation score.

tools.name: suggest_fix
tools.description: Detect common email typos and suggest corrections (e.g. user@gmial.com -> user@gmail.com). Covers Gmail, Yahoo, Hotmail, Outlook, iCloud, Protonmail, and more.
